title: Interest and penalties for individuals - Personal income tax - Canada.ca
content:
## Interest and penalties for individuals - Personal income tax

## Interest and penalties for individuals
- Interest and penalties if you file or pay late
- How to request cancellation or waiver of charges
- When you may qualify for interest relief

## Services and information

### Interest and penalties on late taxes
How interest and penalties apply if you file or pay your taxes late

### Tax instalment interest and penalty
Interest and penalties if you miss, pay late, or underpay instalments

### Cancel or waive penalties and interest
How to request cancellation or waiver of charges on your balance owing

### False reporting or repeated failure to report income
Penalties for failing to report income or making false statements on your return

### COVID-19-related interest relief on 2020 taxes Archived
Interest relief on 2020 taxes owing until April 30, 2022, for eligible individuals who received COVID-19 benefits

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
